tasks.bench:check: deno bench --allow-read --allow-env --json benches/assert.bench.js benches/context.bench.js benches/utils.bench.js | deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env scripts/check-benchmarks.js
tasks.bench:update: deno bench --allow-read --allow-env --json benches/assert.bench.js benches/context.bench.js benches/utils.bench.js | deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env scripts/check-benchmarks.js --save
